"'''Heavy Metal Jedi'''" is a 28-page [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] featured in ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 1]]'', written by [[W. Haden Blackman|Haden Blackman]], drawn by the [[Fillbach Brothers]], colored by [[Sno Cone Studios]], and lettered by [[Michael David Thomas]]. It takes place five months after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]].

==Plot summary==
[[Saesee Tiin/Legends|Saesee Tiin]] and [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] command [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|forces]] at the [[Battle of Iktotch]], while debating their contrasting uses of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]—Tiin's preference for the "''broadsword''," Windu's for the "''rapier''." When a [[B3 ultra battle droid]] arrives on the battlefield, however, they find that both are needed to defeat the new enemy.
